g.title: ICU_H_MALE_MATE
g.text: MPN: Wire-to-wire male mate to KSC 5011-0137-2

text.tspan: 1. all wire connections crimped, not soldered
2. wrap all wires except W4_PWR in automotive cloth tape wrap to 30mm from connectors
3. a) wrap all W1 wires in one sleeve
b) wrap all W2 wires in one sleeve
c) wrap all W3 wires in one sleeve
d) ensure that all 3-pin male connectors can be mated with all CAN_selectors as wrapped
4. any splice type suitable for long-term automotive applications is acceptable
5. splice is acceptable in place of double-crimping for doubled ICU-H wires
if double-crimping is not secure with crimp connectors chosen
6. wire colors are for clarity and not required
7. all twisted pairs (W2_*_twisted, W3_twisted) twisted at 40 twists per meter
